SourceProxy.name: SHYXMeshChecker
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Mesh Checker

Documentation.short_help: Repaired mesh (0) and diagnostic illegal primitives (1).

SourceProxy.Documentation: Port 0: vtkPolyData after combinatorial soup repair (orient + repair_polygon_soup) and, when "Attempt self-intersection repair" is on, CGAL PMP autorefine (same entry points as SHYX Autorefine Self-Intersections: CGAL 6+ autorefine, CGAL 5 experimental autorefine_and_remove_self_intersections). Port 1: diagnostic geometry — VTK_LINE for polygon-soup edges with more than two incident faces (SHYX_CheckReason=1), VTK_POLY_LINE for boundary / hole cycles (2), VTK_TRIANGLE for self-intersection pairs (3). Boundary and self-intersection checks need a valid CGAL polygon mesh; self-intersection enumeration needs a pure triangle mesh.

IntVectorProperty.name: CheckOrient
IntVectorProperty.label: Check / unify orientation (orient_polygon_soup)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, runs CGAL orient_polygon_soup on the polygon soup before the combinatorial mesh test.

IntVectorProperty.name: AttemptOrientRepair
IntVectorProperty.label: Attempt soup repair (repair_polygon_soup)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, runs CGAL repair_polygon_soup after optional orient (splits non-manifold vertices, etc.) to improve chances that polygon_soup_to_polygon_mesh succeeds.

IntVectorProperty.name: AttemptRepairSelfIntersections
IntVectorProperty.label: Attempt self-intersection repair (autorefine, port 0)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, runs CGAL PMP autorefine on the triangle mesh built for port 0 (same as vtkSHYXAutorefineSelfIntersectionFilter). Can change mesh topology; default off.

IntVectorProperty.name: OnlyIfSelfIntersecting
IntVectorProperty.label: Autorefine only if self-intersecting
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on (default), skip autorefine unless CGAL reports self-intersections (does_self_intersect or intersecting face pairs from PMP::self_intersections).

IntVectorProperty.name: PreserveGenus
IntVectorProperty.label: Preserve Genus (CGAL 5 autorefine)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Before CGAL 6: forwarded as preserve_genus to experimental autorefine. Ignored on CGAL 6+.

IntVectorProperty.name: LogSteps
IntVectorProperty.label: Log steps (Output Messages)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, prints per-step diagnostics to the ParaView Output Messages window (vtkWarningMacro).
